title: deer-flow.research.stale.scan v1
description: Emitted by deer-flow's ResearchDispatchConsumer (packages/harness/deerflow/research_dispatch/consumer.py) each time the periodic stale-cycle recovery scan runs (every _STALE_SCAN_INTERVAL_S), independent of whether any stale cycles were found. Consumers use this as a liveness heartbeat for the recovery loop itself.

consumer.description: Name of the bus consumer instance that ran the scan (BaseBusConsumer._name).
